channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TTL] T T Brands Limited, a Promoter Group, Acquires 38,000 Equity Shares of T T Ltd on 6th March, 2026
item.description:
T T Brands Limited, a Promoter Group of T T Ltd, has purchased 38,000 Equity Shares of T T Ltd on 6th March, 2026. The transaction was executed on the market. The value of the transaction was approximately INR 8,82,93,005, excluding taxes and brokerage charges. This disclosure is made under Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015.

  • T T Brands Limited, a Promoter Group, acquires 38,000 Equity Shares of T T Ltd
  • Transaction value is approximately INR 8,82,93,005
  • The acquisition was made on 6th March, 2026
  • The transaction was executed on the market
  • This disclosure is made under Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: T T LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TTL] T.T. Brands Limited, Promoter Group Acquires 38000 Shares of TTL
item.description:
T.T. Brands Limited, a Promoter Group, has acquired 38000 Equity Shares of TTL on 6th March, 2026. This acquisition is in accordance with the Regulations, 2011 and the details of the acquisition are provided in the disclosure made by T.T. Brands Limited under regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation 2015.

  • T.T. Brands Limited, a Promoter Group, has purchased 38000 Equity Shares of TTL.
  • The acquisition was made on 6th March, 2026.
  • The acquisition is in accordance with the Regulations, 2011.
  • The details of the acquisition are provided in the disclosure made by T.T. Brands Limited under regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: T T LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SICAPIT] SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. Approves Fund-raising Proposal of Rs 50 Lakhs via Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures
item.description:
SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. announced the outcome of their Board Meeting held on March 07, 2026. The Board approved a fund-raising proposal by way of issuance of Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures up to a maximum amount of Rs 50 Lakhs through private placement. The key details of the debentures include a face value of Rs 1000 each, a total of 5,000 NCDs, a tenure of up to 60 months, and a coupon rate of 12% payable on a monthly principal basis. The debentures will be secured by a first charge on assets referred to in Schedule III of the Companies Act, 2013.

  • SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. approved a fund-raising proposal of up to Rs 50 Lakhs via Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures.
  • The debentures will have a face value of Rs 1000 each, with a total of 5,000 NCDs issued.
  • The tenure of the debentures will be up to a maximum of 60 months.
  • A coupon rate of 12% payable on a monthly principal basis has been offered.
  • The debentures will be secured by a first charge on assets referred to in Schedule III of the Companies Act, 2013.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SI CAPITAL & FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [NATIONALUM] National Aluminium Company Ltd Announces Changes in Senior Management
item.description:
National Aluminium Company Ltd (NALCO), a Government of India Enterprise, has announced changes in its senior management. The following executives have been promoted as Executive Directors: Shri Satyabadi Mishra, Shri Gautam Harichandan, Shri Ravi Manie, Shri Asutosh Rath, Shri Sachidananda Jena, Shri Sandeep Darbari, Shri Venkata Subba Rao Amperayani, Shri Amarendra Kumar, and Shri Vedula Surendra Sai. The new appointees bring a wealth of experience and expertise in their respective fields, which will be beneficial for the company's growth and development.

  • Shri Satyabadi Mishra, previously CGM (CPP), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for Operation and Maintenance of Captive Power Plant and Utkal Coal Mine at Angul.
  • Shri Gautam Harichandan, previously EPO- ED (Marketing), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for achieving sales target and Marketing of Chemicals and Aluminium Metal.
  • Shri Ravi Manie, previously CGM & Sr TS to CMD, has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for Project and Technological transformation.
  • Shri Asutosh Rath, previously EPO-ED (HR), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for HR activities such as talent acquisition, performance management, leadership development, industrial relations, HR digitalization, CSR, policy governance and media management.
  • Shri Sachidananda Jena, previously EPO-ED(S&P), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for overall Administration, Operation and Maintenance of Smelter & Power Complex, Angul.
  • Shri Sandeep Darbari, previously CGM (Marketing), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for government coordination, parliamentary engagement, and representation of the organization at national and international forums and Sales of aluminium metal and alumina/ chemicals in the Northern region.
  • Shri Venkata Subba Rao Amperayani, previously CGM (PF), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for over all management of Port Facility operations, bulk material handling, rail-port coordination and managing alumina and aluminium logistics.
  • Shri Amarendra Kumar, previously EPO-ED (M&R), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for over all Administration, Operation and Maintenance of Mines and Refinery Complex, Damanjodi.
  • Shri Vedula Surendra Sai, previously EPO-ED(Project), has been promoted as Executive Director and will be responsible for Administration and execution of expansion projects at M&R Complex, Damanjodi.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATIONAL ALUMINIUM CO.LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [HYPERSOFT] Hypersoft Technologies Ltd Receives Listing Approval for 6,82,00,000 Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hypersoft Technologies Ltd has received listing approval from BSE Limited for 6,82,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each. These shares were allotted to promoters and non-promoters on a preferential basis. The approval was granted on March 6, 2026, and the company is required to comply with various regulations, including Regulation 167 of SEBI (ICDR) Regulations and Regulations 31(1)(c) of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015. The company will receive trading approval only after filing necessary approvals and confirmations with the Exchange.

  • Hypersoft Technologies Ltd receives listing approval for 6,82,00,000 equity shares
  • Shares were allotted to promoters and non-promoters on a preferential basis
  • Company is required to comply with various regulations
  • Trading approval will be granted after filing necessary approvals and confirmations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hypersoft Technologies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SICAPIT] SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. Approves Issuance of Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) Up to Rs 50 Lakhs
item.description:
SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors approved the issuance of Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) up to a maximum amount of Rs 50 Lakhs through private placement. The NCDs, which will not be listed, will have a face value of Rs 1000 each, with a total of 5,000 NCDs issued. The tenure of the instrument will be up to a maximum of 60 months, with a 12% annual interest rate, payable on a monthly basis. The NCDs will be secured by a first charge on any assets referred to in Schedule 111 of the Companies Act, 2013, valued by a Registered Valuer.

  • SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. approved the issuance of Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) up to Rs 50 Lakhs.
  • The NCDs will be issued through private placement and will not be listed.
  • The NCDs will have a face value of Rs 1000 each, with a total of 5,000 NCDs issued.
  • The tenure of the instrument will be up to a maximum of 60 months, with a 12% annual interest rate.
  • The NCDs will be secured by a first charge on any assets referred to in Schedule 111 of the Companies Act, 2013, valued by a Registered Valuer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SI CAPITAL & FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [GODREJPROP] Godrej Properties Ltd: Anamudi Real Estates LLP Acquires 0.31% Shares via Open Market
item.description:
Anamudi Real Estates LLP, a designated partner of Godrej Properties Ltd, has acquired 0.31% shares of the company via open market as per the disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition was made on March 5, 2026. The total equity share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 1,50,60,31,720 (30,12,06,344 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each) before and after the acquisition. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company increases slightly to Rs. 1,50,62,49,870 (30,12,49,974 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each) after the acquisition.

  • Anamudi Real Estates LLP, a designated partner of Godrej Properties Ltd, has acquired 0.31% shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made on March 5, 2026 via open market.
  • The total equity share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 1,50,60,31,720 (30,12,06,344 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each) before and after the acquisition.
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company increases slightly to Rs. 1,50,62,49,870 (30,12,49,974 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each) after the acquisition.
  • The acquisition was made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Godrej Properties Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RAMASTEEL] Rama Steel Tubes Ltd. Receives Disclosure under SEBI Regulations for Tarun Dhir of Arun Enterprises
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Tarun Dhir, a Partner of Arun Enterprises. The disclosure is in regard to the sale of equity shares of Rama Steel Tubes Limited. The total shares held by Arun Enterprises after the acquisition is 8,09,66,575, representing 4.95% of the total equity shares of the company. The acquisition was made through the open market on March 05, 2026. The total diluted share capital and voting capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 1,63,60,40,979/- representing 1,63,60,40,979 equity shares of face value of Rs. 1/- each.

  • Tarun Dhir, a Partner of Arun Enterprises, has made a disclosure under SEBI regulations for the sale of equity shares of Rama Steel Tubes Limited.
  • The total shares held by Arun Enterprises after the acquisition is 8,09,66,575, representing 4.95% of the total equity shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market on March 05, 2026.
  • The total diluted share capital and voting capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 1,63,60,40,979/- representing 1,63,60,40,979 equity shares of face value of Rs. 1/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rama Steel Tubes Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SICAPIT] SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. Approves Issuance of Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures up to Rs 50 Lakhs
item.description:
SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. announced that the Board of Directors, at their meeting held on March 07, 2026, approved the issuance of Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) up to a maximum amount of Rs 50 Lakhs through private placement. The NCDs will have a face value of Rs 1000 each, and the total number of securities proposed to be issued is 5,000, amounting to Rs 50,00,000. The tenure of the instrument is up to a maximum of 60 months, with a 12% coupon rate payable on a monthly principal basis. The NCDs will be secured by a first charge on any assets referred to in Schedule 111 of the Companies Act, 2013, valued by a Registered Valuer.

  • SI Capital & Financial Services Ltd. approved the issuance of Secured Unlisted Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) up to Rs 50 Lakhs.
  • The NCDs will have a face value of Rs 1000 each and the total number of securities proposed to be issued is 5,000.
  • The tenure of the instrument is up to a maximum of 60 months with a 12% coupon rate payable on a monthly principal basis.
  • The NCDs will be secured by a first charge on any assets referred to in Schedule 111 of the Companies Act, 2013, valued by a Registered Valuer.
  • The decision was taken at the Board of Directors' meeting held on March 07, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SI CAPITAL & FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [GODREJPROP] Godrej Properties Ltd: Anamudi Real Estates LLP Acquires 0.31% Shares via Open Market
item.description:
Anamudi Real Estates LLP, a part of the Promoter Group, has acquired 0.31% shares of Godrej Properties Ltd via open market as per the disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition took place on March 5, 2026, and the total share capital/voting capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 1,50,60,31,720 (30,12,06,344 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each) after the acquisition.

  • Anamudi Real Estates LLP, a part of the Promoter Group, acquired 0.31% shares of Godrej Properties Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made via open market on March 5, 2026.
  • The total share capital/voting capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 1,50,60,31,720 (30,12,06,344 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each) after the acquisition.
  • The acquisition was disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • Anamudi Real Estates LLP is a part of the Promoter Group of Godrej Properties Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Godrej Properties Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
